response.overview: Uphold charges vary depending on ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167} the asset you're trading, payment method, transaction size, and network conditions. Instead of a single flat trading fee, many transactions include a spread, ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167}and certain deposits or withdrawals may incur additional charges. Uphold's fees are designed to cover trading execution, payment processing, ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167} and blockchain network costs where applicable. The exact fee is typically displayed before you confirm a transaction. 💳 Common Uphold Charges 💹 Trading Fees (Spread)  Trading costs vary by asset type, ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167} with different spreads applied to cryptocurrencies, stablecoins, precious metals, and fiat currencies. ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167} 🏦 Bank Deposits & Withdrawals  Some bank transfer methods may have no platform fee, while processing times and limits depend on the payment method used. ⭐1↯{888}↯{574}↯{7167}
